title: Southwest Community Center Fiber Upgrade for E-Gaming and Property Settlement Ordinance Correction
summary: Two items: (1) IT presents agreement with Spectrum to upgrade Southwest Community Center from coax to fiber connection to support Parks Department e-gaming program, following similar upgrade at Wilson/McBride Street; (2) Department of Assessment corrects settlement ordinance — need to rescind incorrect ordinance reference and amend original Ord. #942 from March 2024 with refund amount of $1,523.89. Assistant Corporation Counsel Trevor McDaniel confirms corrected letter with refund amount being submitted.
